x-ui.effect: Embedder for RAG. Default 'fastembed:BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5' is local, open-source, and free (runs offline). 'openai:text-embedding-3-small|large' is billed per token at ingest AND per query. Changing the model changes the vector dimension, so existing sources must be re-embedded.

Default chunking when a source doesn't specify one: recursive (general), section (Markdown headings), sentence (sentence-aware), semantic (splits where meaning shifts - uses the embedder, slower to ingest).

chunk: search and return the same chunks (default). parent_child: embed small child chunks for precise matching but feed the agent the larger parent passage for context. Changing this requires re-ingesting existing sources.

child_chunk_size.description: Size (chars) of the small child chunks that get embedded in parent_child mode. The parent window uses chunk_size. Ignored in chunk mode.

x-ui.effect: Local cross-encoder used when a retrieval node has rerank on. Default 'Xenova/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2' is small and CPU-fast; 'BAAI/bge-reranker-base' is heavier and more accurate. Runs offline, no API cost.
